nodes.title: Functions and Graphs
nodes.rationale: To understand calculus, a strong foundation in functions and their graphical representation is essential. This module covers how variables relate to each other.

nodes.title: Limits and Continuity
nodes.rationale: Limits are the fundamental building blocks of calculus. Understanding limits is crucial for grasping the concepts of derivatives and integrals.

nodes.title: Introduction to Derivatives
nodes.rationale: The derivative is a core concept in calculus, representing the rate of change of a function. This module introduces what a derivative is and how to calculate it from first principles.
suggested_micro_topics: Calculating derivatives using the limit definition

nodes.title: Basic Differentiation Rules
nodes.rationale: After understanding the concept of a derivative, learning standard rules allows for efficient calculation of derivatives for various types of functions.

nodes.title: The Chain Rule
nodes.rationale: The Chain Rule is essential for differentiating composite functions, which are very common in real-world applications and advanced calculus topics.
suggested_micro_topics: Applying the Chain Rule to various functions
Derivatives of exponential and logarithmic functions using Chain Rule

nodes.title: Implicit Differentiation
nodes.rationale: This module introduces a technique to find the derivative of functions where y is not explicitly defined as a function of x, which is crucial for many geometric and physical problems.
suggested_micro_topics: Differentiating terms involving y with respect to x
Implicit differentiation with product and quotient rules

nodes.title: Applications of Implicit Differentiation
nodes.rationale: Understanding the practical uses of implicit differentiation solidifies the concept and demonstrates its importance in solving real-world problems.
suggested_micro_topics: Finding the slope of a tangent line to an implicitly defined curve
